payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: Square/rectangular black outer frame with a white double mat and glass, containing a centered small sailboat (nautical) print on a pale background; a small sticker or price label is visible on the lower-right of the inner mat and there is mild glare on the glass; entire framed picture is visible in the crop and was likely photographed at approximately 1.0 meter from the camera.
